data_link_connector.location: Exact physical location not verified in the public owner-manual text
data_link_connector.notes: The Ford owner manual confirms the vehicle has a data link connector and identifies protected fuse circuits for it.

body_control_module.notes: The owner manual lists a body control module in the fuse chart, but does not provide a locksmith service location.

passive_key_backup_position.location: Under the removable rubber mat in the centre-console storage area shown in the Ford manual
passive_key_backup_position.notes: Used when the passive-key battery is depleted or the passive-key frequencies are jammed.
